items.title: Critically appraised papers: Adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain [commentary].
items.summary: A commentary suggests that for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain, adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone.
items.curatedReason: 针对退行性半月板撕裂和膝痛，最新评论指出，在单纯家庭锻炼基础上增加物理治疗或励志短信并不能进一步改善疼痛。这意味着目前证据还不支持额外干预的优越性，核心仍是居家锻炼。
items.titleZh: 批判性评估论文：对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝痛，增加物理治疗或励志短信并未比单纯家庭锻炼更有效地改善疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: For degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain, a new commentary highlights that adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone. This suggests current evidence doesn't support the superiority of additional interventions; home exercise remains central.

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [commentary].
items.summary: A commentary indicates that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than center-based pulmonary rehabilitation for COPD.
items.curatedReason: 针对慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）患者，移动端肺康复在运动能力改善方面与中心化康复效果相当，且对健康状况的改善更优。这意味着远程医疗模型在心肺康复领域具有巨大潜力，为患者提供了更便捷、可能更有效的方案。
items.titleZh: 批判性评估论文：移动端肺康复对慢性阻塞性肺疾病的运动能力改善与中心化康复相当，且健康状况改善更优。
items.summaryZh: 一项评述文章指出，针对慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD），移动端肺康复在改善运动能力方面与中心化康复效果相同，但在改善健康状况方面表现更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: For COPD patients, mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation is as effective as center-based rehabilitation in improving exercise capacity and superior in improving health status. This highlights the significant potential of telehealth models in cardiopulmonary rehabilitation, offering patients a more convenient and potentially more effective option.
items.limitation: 本研究为评述性质，并非原始研究，其结论基于对原始研究的批判性评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a commentary, not an original study, and its conclusions are based on a critical appraisal of an original paper.

items.title: Efficacy of High-Intensity Laser Therapy for Meralgia Paresthetica: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Sham-Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blind, sham-controlled trial (n=54) found High-Intensity Laser Therapy significantly improved pain (P=0.006), function (P=0.043), and nerve conduction velocity (P=0.027) in patients with Meralgia Paresthetica at 12 weeks.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT（n=54）发现高强度激光治疗（HILT）在12周时显著改善股外侧皮神经卡压性股痛患者的疼痛（P=0.006）、功能（P=0.043）和神经传导速度（P=0.027）。这支持了 HILT 作为该病症的有效治疗手段，你可以考虑将其纳入临床实践。
items.titleZh: 高强度激光治疗股外侧皮神经卡压性股痛的疗效：一项随机、双盲、假对照试验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT (n=54) found that High-Intensity Laser Therapy (HILT) significantly improved pain (P=0.006), function (P=0.043), and nerve conduction velocity (P=0.027) at 12 weeks for patients with meralgia paresthetica. This supports HILT as an effective treatment for this condition, and you may consider incorporating it into clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究随访期相对较短（12周），长期疗效仍待观察。
items.limitationEn: The study's follow-up period is relatively short (12 weeks), so long-term efficacy remains to be observed.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Functional stratification reveals speed-independent gait impairments beyond chronological age.
items.summary: A study with 190 adults showed that stratifying older adults by functional status using the Short Physical Performance Battery (SPPB) enhances sensitivity in detecting gait abnormalities and instability-related compensatory patterns beyond chronological age.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现根据功能状态（SPPB）而非年龄来分层老年人，能更敏感地识别步态障碍和不稳定代偿模式。在你的老年康复评估中，考虑结合功能性分层，能更早发现高风险个体，进行更精准的干预。
items.titleZh: 功能性分层揭示了超越年龄的速度独立步态障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that stratifying older adults by functional status (SPPB) rather than chronological age more sensitively identifies gait impairments and instability-related compensatory patterns. In your geriatric rehabilitation assessments, consider incorporating functional stratification to detect high-risk individuals earlier and enable more precise interventions.
items.limitation: 研究设计为横断面，无法确立功能性分层与步态障碍进展的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study design is cross-sectional, so it cannot establish a causal relationship between functional stratification and gait impairment progression.

items.title: "Are Cardiac Rehabilitation Programs Effective in Improving Aerobic Capacity for People with Transient Ischemic Attack and Stroke? A Rapid Review and Meta-analysis".
items.summary: A rapid review and meta-analysis of nine studies (n=490) found that cardiac rehabilitation improved aerobic capacity (28m, 95% CI 16m to 39m) and showed promising improvements in systolic blood pressure for people with stroke or TIA.
items.curatedReason: 这项快速综述和 Meta 分析（9 项研究，n=490）证实了心脏康复对卒中或TIA患者有明确的改善有氧能力（28米，95% CI 16米至39米）的效果，并提示可改善收缩压。你可以将心脏康复作为卒中/TIA患者长期恢复的推荐方案。
items.titleZh: “心脏康复项目是否能有效改善短暂性脑缺血发作和卒中患者的有氧能力？一项快速综述和 Meta 分析”。
items.curatedReasonEn: This rapid review and meta-analysis (9 studies, n=490) confirms that cardiac rehabilitation significantly improves aerobic capacity (28m, 95% CI 16m to 39m) in stroke or TIA patients, and suggests improvements in systolic blood pressure. You can confidently recommend cardiac rehabilitation as a long-term recovery strategy for stroke/TIA patients.
items.limitation: 纳入研究质量普遍为中低，且Meta分析仅包含3项研究。
items.limitationEn: The quality of included studies was generally low to moderate, and the meta-analysis only included 3 studies.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Investigation of the Effectiveness of Extracorporeal Shock Wave Therapy and Kinesiotaping in Individuals With Carpal Tunnel Syndrome: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=54) found that extracorporeal shock wave therapy and kinesiotaping, when added to wrist splinting and nerve-tendon gliding exercises, improved clinical and electrophysiological outcomes in mild to moderate Carpal Tunnel Syndrome more than traditional treatment alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT（n=54）比较了腕部夹板、神经-肌腱滑动锻炼、体外冲击波（ESWT）和肌内效贴（KT）对腕管综合征的疗效。研究发现 ESWT 结合传统治疗或在此基础上再加 KT 均优于单纯传统治疗。考虑将 ESWT 作为腕管综合征的有效辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 体外冲击波疗法和肌内效贴在腕管综合征患者中疗效的探讨：一项随机对照试验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT (n=54) compared the efficacy of wrist splinting, nerve-tendon gliding exercises, extracorporeal shock wave therapy (ESWT), and kinesiotaping (KT) for carpal tunnel syndrome. The study found that ESWT combined with traditional therapy, or with KT added, was superior to traditional therapy alone. Consider ESWT as an effective adjunct for carpal tunnel syndrome.
items.limitation: 仅评估了轻中度腕管综合征患者，结果不适用于重度病例。
items.limitationEn: Only evaluated patients with mild to moderate carpal tunnel syndrome; results are not applicable to severe cases.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Appropriate translational designs for determining causal force-based (manual therapy) treatment mechanisms.
items.summary: This commentary identifies five causal research designs to investigate the "why" and "how" of force-based manual therapy treatment mechanisms, moving beyond merely establishing "whether" they work.
items.curatedReason: 这篇述评梳理了因果推断研究设计，提醒你深究手法治疗 "为何有效" 时，需要更严谨的方法来确定治疗机制的因果性，而不是仅仅停留在 "是否有效" 的层面。
items.titleZh: 用于确定基于力的手法治疗因果机制的适当转化设计。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary outlines causal inference research designs, reminding you that when investigating "why" manual therapy works, more rigorous methods are needed to establish the causality of treatment mechanisms, rather than merely focusing on "whether" it works.

items.title: Manual therapy promotes prefrontal neural efficiency in chronic non-specific neck pain: An fNIRS-Based randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=30) found that combined manual therapy and exercise improved prefrontal neural efficiency and clinical outcomes in chronic non-specific neck pain, as measured by fNIRS.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 首次通过 fNIRS 揭示了手法治疗联合运动可能通过提高前额叶神经效率来改善慢性非特异性颈痛，为结合干预的神经生理机制提供了初步证据。但样本量较小，需更大规模研究验证。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗可促进慢性非特异性颈痛患者的前额叶神经效率：一项基于 fNIRS 的随机对照试验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT, using fNIRS, is the first to suggest that combined manual therapy and exercise may improve chronic non-specific neck pain by enhancing prefrontal neural efficiency, offering initial evidence for the neurophysiological mechanisms of combined interventions. However, the small sample size warrants validation with larger studies.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小，神经影像学结果外推至临床效应需更多验证。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size, and neuroimaging findings require further validation for clinical relevance.

items.title: Effect of Visceral Manipulation Versus Integrated Neuromuscular Inhibition Technique in Shoulder Impingement Syndrome.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=75) found that both Visceral Manipulation and Integrated Neuromuscular Inhibition Technique significantly improved pain intensity, shoulder function, and range of motion in patients with shoulder impingement syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示，内脏手法和整合神经肌肉抑制技术对肩峰撞击综合征的疼痛、功能和 ROM 均有改善。内脏手法考虑了脏器相互作用，为治疗SIS提供了新的思路，但具体机制和长期效果仍需进一步研究。
items.titleZh: 内脏手法与整合神经肌肉抑制技术在肩峰撞击综合征中的疗效比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that both Visceral Manipulation (VM) and Integrated Neuromuscular Inhibition Technique (INIT) improve pain, function, and ROM in shoulder impingement syndrome. VM offers a new perspective by considering viscerosomatic interactions for SIS treatment, but specific mechanisms and long-term effects still require further research.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于20-40岁的患者，结果外推至其他年龄组需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study participants were limited to patients aged 20-40 years, so generalizing the results to other age groups should be done cautiously.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Accuracy of visual estimation of shoulder abduction by expert physiotherapists: a comparative study using 3D motion capture.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study found moderate agreement between expert visual estimation of shoulder abduction and 3D motion capture, highlighting potential discrepancies in clinical assessment.
items.curatedReason: 研究发现经验丰富的物理治疗师对肩外展的目测评估与 3D 运动捕捉存在中等一致性。这提示你，即使是专家，目测也可能存在误差，对精确评估关节活动度时仍需谨慎，或考虑辅助客观测量。
items.titleZh: 专家物理治疗师目测肩关节外展准确性：一项使用 3D 运动捕捉的比较研究。
items.limitation: 研究对象为健康人群，结果外推到临床患者需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study was conducted on healthy participants, so extrapolation of results to clinical patients should be done with caution.

items.title: Between the Snap and the Return: A Prospective Narrative Analysis of Four Voices from inside Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction Recovery.
items.summary: A longitudinal qualitative study explored the prospective narratives of four adults undergoing ACL reconstruction recovery, highlighting the evolving physical and psychological experiences from injury to self-defined rehabilitation goals.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究深入分析了四名患者 ACL 重建康复的叙事，揭示了患者从损伤到重返运动过程中的复杂心理和社会体验。这提醒你在临床实践中，除了生物力学恢复，更要关注患者的整体叙事和主观感受。
items.titleZh: 在撕裂与回归之间：前交叉韧带重建康复中四位患者叙事的预期性分析。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study offers a deep narrative analysis of four patients' ACL reconstruction recovery, revealing complex psychological and social experiences from injury to return to sport. This reminds you that in clinical practice, alongside biomechanical recovery, it's crucial to attend to patients' holistic narratives and subjective experiences.
items.limitation: 定性研究样本量小，结果不具统计学普遍性，但提供了深度个体经验。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size, so results are not statistically generalizable, but it provides in-depth individual experiences.

items.title: Toward Precision Cardiac Rehabilitation: Current Limitations and Future Opportunities of Omics and Artificial Intelligence.
items.summary: This review discusses current limitations and future opportunities of omics and artificial intelligence in achieving precision cardiac rehabilitation by tailoring interventions to individual genetic, molecular, and physiological characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述展望了组学和 AI 在精准心脏康复中的应用潜力，虽然仍是早期概念，但其个性化干预的愿景值得关注，提示你未来康复治疗可能转向数据驱动的精细化定制。
items.titleZh: 迈向精准心脏康复：组学和人工智能的当前局限与未来机遇。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review explores the potential of omics and AI in precision cardiac rehabilitation. While still an early concept, its vision for personalized interventions is noteworthy, suggesting that future rehabilitation may shift towards data-driven, refined customization.

items.title: Neurogenic bowel dysfunction in multiple sclerosis: clinical determinants and its association with bladder dysfunction in a multicenter study
items.summary: This multicenter study aimed to determine the prevalence and severity of neurogenic bowel dysfunction (NBD) in multiple sclerosis (MS) and identify clinical factors associated with moderate-to-severe bowel dysfunction and its association with bladder dysfunction.
items.curatedReason: 多发性硬化（MS）患者的神经源性肠道功能障碍是一个常见且影响生活质量的问题。这项多中心研究将帮助你识别与中重度肠道功能障碍相关的临床因素，并提示其与膀胱功能障碍的关联，指导你进行更全面的评估和管理。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症中的神经源性肠道功能障碍：一项多中心研究的临床决定因素及其与膀胱功能障碍的关联。
items.summaryZh: 这项多中心研究旨在确定多发性硬化症（MS）中神经源性肠道功能障碍（NBD）的患病率和严重程度，并识别与中重度肠道功能障碍相关的临床因素及其与膀胱功能障碍的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Neurogenic bowel dysfunction (NBD) is a common and quality-of-life-impacting issue for MS patients. This multicenter study will help you identify clinical factors associated with moderate-to-severe NBD and its link to bladder dysfunction, guiding more comprehensive assessment and management.
items.limitation: 研究设计为观察性研究，不能确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: The study design is observational, which cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Elevance pays CMS $342M in midst of Medicare Advantage probe
items.summary: Elevance Health paid CMS $342 million amid a Medicare Advantage probe, signaling increased scrutiny on overpayments and compliance in the MA program.
items.curatedReason: Elevance Health 在 Medicare Advantage 调查期间向 CMS 支付 3.42 亿美元，这表明 Medicare Advantage 的报销审查正在收紧。你需要关注这类合规动态，以避免潜在的报销风险。
items.titleZh: Elevance 在 Medicare Advantage 调查中向 CMS 支付 3.42 亿美元。
items.summaryZh: Elevance Health 在 Medicare Advantage 调查期间向 CMS 支付了 3.42 亿美元，这预示着医疗保险优势计划（MA）在过度支付和合规性方面的审查日益严格。
items.curatedReasonEn: Elevance Health's $342 million payment to CMS amidst a Medicare Advantage probe signals tightening reimbursement scrutiny for MA plans. You need to monitor such compliance trends to mitigate potential reimbursement risks.

items.title: Total Knee Arthroplasty (TKA)
items.summary: The APTA provides an evidence-based clinical summary for Total Knee Arthroplasty (TKA), offering guidance for patient care.
items.curatedReason: 这份来自 APTA 的全膝关节置换（TKA）临床总结，为临床医生提供了一个快速查阅的循证资源。你可以用它来核对当前的最佳实践，或作为新入职治疗师的参考。
items.titleZh: 全膝关节置换术 (TKA) 临床总结。
items.summaryZh: APTA 发布了一份关于全膝关节置换术 (TKA) 的循证临床总结，为患者护理提供指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: This APTA clinical summary on Total Knee Arthroplasty (TKA) provides a quick-reference, evidence-based resource for clinicians. You can use it to verify current best practices or as a reference for new therapists.

items.title: Klomp named to key HHS post
items.summary: Chris Klomp has been named to a key position within the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS).
items.curatedReason: Chris Klomp 被任命为 HHS 关键职务，这一高层人事变动可能预示着未来美国医疗政策和监管方向的微调，值得关注。
items.titleZh: Klomp 获任 HHS 关键职位。
items.summaryZh: Chris Klomp 已被任命为美国卫生与公众服务部（HHS）的一个关键职位。
items.curatedReasonEn: Chris Klomp's appointment to a key HHS post may signal subtle shifts in future U.S. healthcare policy and regulatory directions, warranting attention.

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review establishes weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury, addressing the high recurrence rate and lack of consensus.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和方法学质量分析，旨在为胕绳肌损伤后的重返运动制定加权标准。了解这些标准能帮助你更科学地评估运动员的恢复状况，减少复发风险，并与教练和运动员进行更有效的沟通。
items.titleZh: 胕绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准：系统综述与方法学质量分析
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and methodological quality analysis aims to establish weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury. Understanding these criteria will help you more scientifically assess an athlete's recovery status, reduce recurrence risk, and communicate more effectively with coaches and athletes.
items.limitation: 未明确给出综述纳入研究的具体数量和异质性。
items.limitationEn: The review does not explicitly state the number of included studies or their heterogeneity.

items.title: Shortwave diathermy for managing knee osteoarthritis: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 17 trials (n=1372) found shortwave diathermy significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]) and walking ability (mean -0.97; 95% CI [-1.30, -0.65]) for knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入17项试验（1372名参与者）的系统综述和荟萃分析证实，短波透热疗法（SWD）显著改善了膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者的疼痛（平均-2.13；95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]）和步行能力（平均-0.97；95% CI [-1.30, -0.65]）。如果你的KOA患者对其他干预反应不佳，或作为辅助治疗，SWD值得考虑。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法治疗膝骨关节炎：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis of 17 trials (1372 participants) confirms that Shortwave Diathermy (SWD) significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]) and walking ability (mean -0.97; 95% CI [-1.30, -0.65]) in knee osteoarthritis (KOA) patients. If your KOA patients are not responding well to other interventions, or as an adjunctive treatment, SWD is worth considering.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告疼痛和步行能力改善的临床最小重要差异（MCID），影响临床实践的解读。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report the Minimum Clinically Important Difference (MCID) for pain and walking ability improvements, which impacts clinical interpretation.

items.title: Cortical activation and functional connectivity during thumb-to-finger opposition in patients with stroke with varying functional levels: insights from fNIRS.
items.summary: A study with 52 stroke patients found varying cortical activation and functional connectivity during thumb-to-finger opposition, assessed by fNIRS, depending on hand function level and dominance.
items.curatedReason: 这项fNIRS研究揭示了卒中患者在拇指对指任务中，大脑皮层激活模式和功能连接随手功能水平和手优势侧的变化。这些神经生理学见解有助于你理解不同功能恢复阶段患者的皮层重组机制，并可能指导更精细化的神经康复策略。
items.titleZh: fNIRS 研究揭示卒中患者在拇指对指任务中，皮层激活和功能连接随功能水平变化
items.curatedReasonEn: This fNIRS study reveals changes in cortical activation patterns and functional connectivity during a thumb-to-finger opposition task in stroke patients, varying with hand function level and dominance. These neurophysiological insights can help you understand cortical reorganization mechanisms at different stages of functional recovery and potentially guide more refined neurorehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（52名患者），且仅限于右利手患者。
items.limitationEn: The study has a relatively small sample size (52 patients) and is limited to right-handed individuals.

items.title: Advanced practice provider students win reprieve from lower loan cap
items.summary: Advanced practice provider students have won a reprieve from a lower loan cap rule imposed by the U.S. Education Department, following a judge's decision.
items.curatedReason: 美国教育部门对高级执业提供者（APP）学生贷款上限规则的暂缓执行，对正在就读或计划就读物理治疗（DPT）项目的学生而言是利好消息。这可能影响到未来 PT 教育的可负担性，你需要关注后续政策动向。
items.titleZh: 高级执业提供者学生贷款上限获暂缓
items.summaryZh: 在一位法官做出裁决后，美国教育部门对高级执业提供者学生的较低贷款上限规定获暂缓执行。
items.curatedReasonEn: The reprieve from lower loan caps for Advanced Practice Provider (APP) students by the U.S. Education Department is good news for those enrolled in or planning to pursue Doctor of Physical Therapy (DPT) programs. This may impact the affordability of future PT education, and you should monitor subsequent policy developments.

items.title: UnitedHealth’s Optum in talks to sell orthopedics, surgery services in New York
items.summary: UnitedHealth's Optum is reportedly in talks to sell its orthopedic and surgery services in New York, potentially indicating a strategic realignment within the healthcare market.
items.curatedReason: Optum 计划出售在纽约州的骨科和外科服务，这可能预示着大型医疗集团在特定地区进行业务重组。关注这类市场动态有助于你评估当地医疗服务供需变化和潜在的合作机会。
items.titleZh: UnitedHealth 旗下 Optum 洽谈出售纽约的骨科和外科服务。
items.summaryZh: 据报道，UnitedHealth 旗下的 Optum 正在洽谈出售其在纽约州的骨科和外科服务，这可能预示着医疗市场内部的战略调整。
items.curatedReasonEn: Optum's plan to sell its orthopedic and surgical services in New York may signal business restructuring by large healthcare groups in specific regions. Monitoring such market dynamics can help you assess changes in local healthcare supply and demand and potential collaboration opportunities.

items.title: Decision support in the management of musculoskeletal disorders: a qualitative study of physiotherapists' and patients' experiences.
items.summary: A qualitative study in Norwegian primary healthcare found that an AI-driven clinical decision support system influenced decision-making processes for both musculoskeletal disorder patients and physiotherapists, impacting shared decision-making and trust.
items.curatedReason: 挪威基层医疗的定性研究显示，AI 驱动的临床决策支持系统 (CDSS) 对骨骼肌肉疾病患者和物理治疗师的决策过程有显著影响，提示 AI 工具整合需考量人机交互和信任。
items.titleZh: 骨骼肌肉疾病管理中的决策支持：物理治疗师和患者经验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对挪威基层医疗中 11 名骨骼肌肉疾病患者和 10 名物理治疗师的定性研究显示，人工智能驱动的临床决策支持系统 (CDSS) 显著影响了患者和治疗师的决策过程，凸显了在临床实践中整合此类工具时对人机交互和信任的考量。
items.curatedReasonEn: A qualitative study in Norwegian primary care indicates that AI-driven Clinical Decision Support Systems (CDSS) significantly impact decision-making for musculoskeletal patients and physiotherapists, highlighting the need to consider human-AI interaction and trust during integration.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（11 名患者和 10 名物理治疗师），结果的普适性有限。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size (11 patients and 10 physiotherapists), limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Where physician assistant shortages may deepen by 2038
items.summary: Modern Healthcare reports on areas where physician assistant shortages may worsen by 2038, indicating broader implications for healthcare staffing.
items.curatedReason: 这份报告预测了到 2038 年医师助理 (PA) 短缺可能加剧的区域。虽然直接针对 PA，但这种趋势也暗示了整个医疗人力资源，尤其是康复治疗师等辅助专业人员的潜在短缺，值得你关注。这意味着在这些短缺地区，PT/OT/SLP 的需求和执业机会可能增加。
items.titleZh: 到 2038 年医师助理短缺可能加剧的地区
items.summaryZh: Modern Healthcare 报道，到 2038 年，美国部分地区医师助理 (PA) 的短缺情况可能加剧，这反映了医疗人力资源面临的普遍挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This report forecasts regions where physician assistant (PA) shortages may deepen by 2038. While directly addressing PAs, this trend also signals potential shortages across the entire healthcare workforce, including allied health professionals like rehabilitation therapists, which you should monitor. This means demand and practice opportunities for PT/OT/SLP might increase in these shortage areas.

items.title: How hospitals are outpacing rivals in outpatient push
items.summary: Modern Healthcare reports on how hospitals are expanding their outpatient services to outpace competitors, indicating a significant shift in healthcare delivery models.
items.curatedReason: 这份报告分析了医院如何在门诊服务扩展上超越竞争对手，这提示你作为物理治疗师，需要了解行业正在向门诊模式倾斜。这可能为独立的物理治疗诊所带来更多竞争，但也可能创造与大型医疗系统合作的新机遇。
items.titleZh: 医院如何在门诊服务拓展中超越竞争对手
items.summaryZh: Modern Healthcare 报道了医院如何通过拓展门诊服务来超越竞争对手，这反映了医疗服务模式正向门诊化显著转变，对独立诊所和大型医疗系统均构成挑战与机遇。
items.curatedReasonEn: This report analyzes how hospitals are outperforming rivals in outpatient service expansion, signaling to you as a physical therapist that the industry is shifting towards outpatient models. This could intensify competition for independent PT clinics but also create new collaboration opportunities with larger healthcare systems.

items.title: Cognitive strategies for improving activity-level outcomes post stroke: an integrative review.
items.summary: An integrative review identified 40 studies (half RCTs) on cognitive strategy interventions for post-stroke cognitive impairments, focusing on rehabilitation engagement and activity-level outcomes, with interventions delivered from 6 days to 9.5 years post-stroke.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后认知策略整合性综述，提供了大量证据。如果你管理卒中后认知障碍患者，这份综述系统梳理了现有干预措施，特别是活动水平的改善。请注意，仍有半数研究是非随机对照试验，提示未来需要更多高质量研究。
items.titleZh: 卒中后认知策略对改善活动水平结局的整合性综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项整合性综述发现40项关于卒中后认知障碍的认知策略干预研究（其中20项为RCT），旨在支持康复参与和活动水平结局，干预实施时间为卒中后6天至9.5年。
items.curatedReasonEn: This integrative review on cognitive strategies post-stroke offers substantial evidence. If you manage patients with post-stroke cognitive impairments, this review systematically synthesizes existing interventions, particularly for improving activity-level outcomes. Note that half of the studies were not RCTs, indicating a need for more high-quality research.
items.limitation: 纳入研究中半数为非随机对照试验，证据强度仍有提升空间。
items.limitationEn: Half of the included studies were not randomized controlled trials, suggesting room for stronger evidence.

items.title: Employers' perceptions of supporting an employee's work reintegration following stroke.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored employers' perspectives on supporting employees returning to work after stroke, identifying themes like the role of the vocational rehabilitation team and the importance of knowledge.
items.curatedReason: 雇主对卒中幸存者重返工作岗位的支持，仍然集中在康复团队的协助和对疾病的理解上。你的康复团队如果在工作中能体现出专业性、提供清晰的指导，对患者重返工作会有积极影响。
items.titleZh: 雇主对卒中幸存员工重返工作岗位的支持认知。
items.summaryZh: 本定性研究探讨了雇主在支持卒中幸存员工重返工作岗位时的经验和视角，发现职业康复团队的作用和知识普及是关键主题。
items.curatedReasonEn: Employers' support for stroke survivors returning to work still focuses on rehabilitation team assistance and understanding the condition. Your rehab team's professionalism and clear guidance during the process will positively impact patients' work reintegration.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小（10位雇主），结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size (10 employers), limiting generalizability.

items.title: Epidural versus Transcutaneous Spinal Cord Stimulation for Motor Recovery after Spinal Cord Injury: A Comparative Analysis
items.summary: This comparative analysis investigates epidural versus transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation for motor recovery after spinal cord injury, a promising neurostimulation approach.
items.curatedReason: 脊髓损伤后运动恢复，硬膜外与经皮脊髓电刺激的对比分析，为您提供了新的神经调节干预策略的线索。在考虑这类先进疗法时，要密切关注临床试验进展和安全性数据。
items.titleZh: 硬膜外与经皮脊髓电刺激在脊髓损伤后运动恢复中的比较分析。
items.summaryZh: 本比较分析探讨了硬膜外与经皮脊髓电刺激在脊髓损伤后运动功能恢复中的作用，这是一种有前景的神经刺激方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: The comparative analysis of epidural versus transcutaneous spinal cord stimulation for motor recovery post-SCI offers insights into novel neuromodulation strategies. Closely monitor clinical trial progress and safety data when considering these advanced therapies.
items.limitation: 这是一篇预印本论文，未经同行评审，结果应谨慎解读。
items.limitationEn: This is a preprint and has not undergone peer review; results should be interpreted with caution.

items.title: Read more about Calendar Year (CY) 2027 End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) Prospective Payment System Proposed Rule
items.summary: CMS has released the proposed rule for the Calendar Year (CY) 2027 End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) Prospective Payment System, outlining potential changes to reimbursement and policies.
items.curatedReason: CMS 2027 年终末期肾病 (ESRD) 预付款系统拟议规则将直接影响肾脏康复服务的报销。仔细审阅这些提议，以确保你的机构能够适应未来的报销变化，并适时提供反馈。
items.titleZh: 阅读更多关于 2027 日历年 (CY) 终末期肾病 (ESRD) 预付款系统拟议规则
items.summaryZh: 美国医疗保险和医疗补助服务中心 (CMS) 发布了 2027 日历年 (CY) 终末期肾病 (ESRD) 预付款系统拟议规则，其中概述了报销和政策的潜在变化。
items.curatedReasonEn: The CMS Calendar Year (CY) 2027 End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) Prospective Payment System Proposed Rule will directly impact reimbursement for renal rehabilitation services. Review these proposals carefully to ensure your facility can adapt to future reimbursement changes and provide timely feedback.

items.title: APTA Combined Sections Meeting
items.summary: The APTA Combined Sections Meeting (CSM) is an annual conference bringing together physical therapy professionals from various specialties to share research, clinical insights, and advancements.
items.curatedReason: APTA CSM 是美国物理治疗领域最重要的年度会议之一，为你提供了了解最新研究、技术和临床实践进展的机会。如果你想跟进前沿信息，务必关注其日程和报告。
items.titleZh: APTA 联合分会年会 (CSM)
items.summaryZh: APTA 联合分会年会 (CSM) 是一项年度盛会，汇集了来自不同专业的物理治疗师，共同分享研究成果、临床见解和行业进展。
items.curatedReasonEn: The APTA CSM is one of the most important annual conferences in US physical therapy, offering you an opportunity to learn about the latest research, technologies, and clinical practice advancements. If you aim to stay current, monitor its schedule and reports.

items.title: FDA drops complaint against Whoop’s blood pressure tracking tool
items.summary: The FDA has dropped its complaint against Whoop regarding its blood pressure tracking tool, signaling ongoing regulatory discussions for wearable health tech.
items.curatedReason: FDA 撤销对 Whoop 血压追踪工具的投诉，提示可穿戴设备在健康监测领域的监管边界仍在探索中。关注这类设备未来在辅助临床评估中的作用，但目前不应替代专业医疗诊断。
items.titleZh: FDA 撤销对 Whoop 血压追踪工具的投诉
items.summaryZh: FDA 已撤销对可穿戴设备公司 Whoop 及其血压追踪工具的投诉，显示可穿戴健康技术产品的监管界限仍在发展中。
items.curatedReasonEn: The FDA's withdrawal of a complaint against Whoop's blood pressure tracking tool indicates that regulatory boundaries for wearables in health monitoring are still evolving. Watch for their future role in complementing clinical assessments, but they should not replace professional medical diagnoses now.

items.title: rTMS Over Dorsolateral Prefrontal Cortex Augments Dual-Task Training for Mobility, Balance and Cognition in Sub-Acute Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: An RCT found adding repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) over DLPFC to dual-task exercise significantly augmented dual-task mobility, balance, and cognitive performance in 30 sub-acute stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 亚急性卒中患者，将重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）应用于背外侧前额叶皮层，可增强双任务训练对活动能力、平衡和认知功能的效果。如果你在管理亚急性卒中患者，考虑将rTMS作为DT训练的辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激DLPFC可增强亚急性卒中患者双任务训练在活动能力、平衡和认知上的效果：随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，在亚急性卒中患者（30例）的双任务训练中加入背外侧前额叶皮层重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS），可显著增强其双任务活动能力、平衡和认知表现。
items.curatedReasonEn: For sub-acute stroke patients, applying rTMS to the dorsolateral prefrontal cortex can augment dual-task training for mobility, balance, and cognition. If you manage sub-acute stroke, consider rTMS as an adjunct to DT training.
items.limitation: 样本量较小（30名患者），可能限制结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: The small sample size (30 patients) may limit the generalizability of the results.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Healthcare is all in on AI but still grappling with the guardrails
items.summary: The healthcare industry is fully embracing artificial intelligence, but continues to grapple with establishing appropriate guardrails for its implementation and use.
items.curatedReason: 医疗保健领域普遍拥抱AI，但仍在摸索监管边界。你作为PT，需要关注AI工具的临床应用指南和伦理规范，以确保患者安全和数据隐私。
items.titleZh: 医疗保健全面拥抱AI，但仍在摸索监管边界
items.summaryZh: 医疗保健行业正全面拥抱人工智能，但仍在努力为其应用和使用建立适当的监管边界。
items.curatedReasonEn: Healthcare is widely adopting AI, but regulatory guardrails are still evolving. As a PT, you need to stay informed on clinical application guidelines and ethical norms for AI tools to ensure patient safety and data privacy.

items.title: Incremental predictive value of spatiotemporal gait parameters beyond clinical measures for achieving independent outdoor ambulation in subacute stroke patients: A retrospective cohort study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study found that spatiotemporal gait parameters offer incremental predictive value beyond clinical measures for achieving independent outdoor ambulation in subacute stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 在亚急性卒中患者中，步态时空参数在预测独立户外行走能力方面，对传统临床评估（如FAC）具有增量预测价值。这意味着使用步态分析仪能更精细地评估患者的预后，并为康复方案提供更具体的数据支持。
items.titleZh: 亚急性卒中患者步态时空参数在预测独立户外行走能力方面的增量预测价值：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究发现，在亚急性卒中患者中，步态时空参数在预测独立户外行走能力方面，对传统临床评估具有增量预测价值。
items.curatedReasonEn: In subacute stroke patients, spatiotemporal gait parameters provide incremental predictive value beyond traditional clinical assessments (e.g., FAC) for achieving independent outdoor ambulation. This implies that instrumented gait analysis can offer a more refined prognostic assessment and provide more specific data to guide rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素和选择偏倚，且仅限于亚急性卒中患者。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, which may be subject to confounding and selection bias, and is limited to subacute stroke patients.

items.title: Developing a patient decision aid for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome: A mixed-methods study.
items.summary: A mixed-methods study developed and user-tested a patient decision aid for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome (FAIS), aiming to help young, active patients understand the benefits and risks of non-surgical management versus hip arthroscopy.
items.curatedReason: 这份混合方法研究描述了FAIS患者决策辅助工具的开发过程，旨在帮助年轻活跃人群权衡保守治疗与髋关节镜手术的利弊。工具本身尚处于开发和用户测试阶段，但提示了未来患者教育的潜在方向。
items.titleZh: 股骨髋臼撞击综合征患者决策辅助工具的开发：一项混合方法研究
items.summaryZh: 一项混合方法研究开发并用户测试了股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAIS）的患者决策辅助工具，旨在帮助年轻活跃患者理解非手术管理与髋关节镜手术的潜在益处和风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This mixed-methods study details the development of a patient decision aid for FAIS, aiming to help young, active individuals weigh the pros and cons of non-surgical management versus hip arthroscopy. While the tool is still in development and user-testing, it suggests a potential direction for future patient education.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于工具的开发和初步用户测试，未评估其临床有效性和长期结果。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to the development and initial user-testing of the tool, without evaluating its clinical effectiveness or long-term outcomes.

items.title: Implementing Live Long Walk Strong: Practice-based evidence on adapting a physical therapy program across diverse contexts.
items.summary: A process evaluation study described how the Live Long Walk Strong physical therapy program, designed to improve mobility in older adults, was adapted across four diverse clinical settings.
items.curatedReason: Live Long Walk Strong项目在不同临床环境中实施的实践证据表明，物理治疗项目可以通过适应性调整来扩大覆盖范围，改善老年人的移动能力。这提示你，现有循证项目在推广时，应重视根据实际环境进行合理本地化。
items.titleZh: 实施“健步强身”项目：一项关于物理治疗项目在不同背景下适应性调整的实践证据研究
items.summaryZh: 一项过程评估研究描述了旨在改善老年人移动能力的物理治疗项目“健步强身”如何在四个不同临床环境中进行适应性调整。
items.curatedReasonEn: Practice-based evidence on the implementation of the Live Long Walk Strong program across diverse clinical contexts shows that physical therapy programs can expand their reach and improve mobility in older adults through adaptive modifications. This suggests that when disseminating existing evidence-based programs, you should prioritize reasonable localization based on the actual environment.
items.limitation: 这是一项过程评估研究，主要关注程序适应性，而非项目本身的临床疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a process evaluation study, focusing primarily on program adaptability rather than the clinical efficacy of the program itself.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation

items.title: Inter-rater reliability and construct validity of a cross-diagnostic movement quality score for rehabilitation assessment.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 84 hospitalized rehabilitation patients found good inter-rater reliability and construct validity for a Movement Quality Score (MQS) within the Standard Physical Therapy Assessment (SPTA) across neurological, musculoskeletal, and internal medical conditions.
items.curatedReason: 运动质量评分 (MQS) 在住院康复患者中表现出良好的评估者间信度和结构效度，无论患者诊断如何。在跨诊断人群中使用 MQS，你将有更可靠的基线评估工具。
items.titleZh: 跨诊断运动质量评分在康复评估中的评估者间信度和结构效度
items.summaryZh: 一项对 84 名住院康复患者进行的横断面研究发现，标准物理治疗评估 (SPTA) 中的运动质量评分 (MQS) 在神经、肌肉骨骼和内科疾病患者中均表现出良好的评估者间信度和结构效度。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Movement Quality Score (MQS) shows good inter-rater reliability and construct validity across diverse diagnostic groups in inpatient rehabilitation. You'll find MQS a more reliable baseline assessment tool for cross-diagnostic populations.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于住院患者，可能限制结果向门诊或社区康复环境的推广。
items.limitationEn: The study was limited to hospitalized patients, which may restrict generalizability to outpatient or community rehabilitation settings.

items.title: Living with spinal cord injury in the community of Bangladesh: a comprehensive analysis using the ICF framework.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Bangladesh analyzed functioning, environmental, and personal factors among 773 individuals with spinal cord injury using the ICF framework, providing a comprehensive understanding of community living challenges.
items.curatedReason: 这项在孟加拉国的横断面研究深入分析了社区脊髓损伤患者的功能限制和相关因素，强调了环境和个人因素的关键作用。你可以借鉴 ICF 框架来更全面地评估和干预你所在社区的脊髓损伤患者。
items.titleZh: 孟加拉国社区脊髓损伤患者生活状况：基于 ICF 框架的综合分析
items.summaryZh: 一项在孟加拉国进行的横断面研究，使用 ICF 框架分析了 773 名脊髓损伤患者的功能、环境和个人因素，全面了解了其社区生活面临的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study in Bangladesh offers an in-depth analysis of functional limitations and associated factors in community-dwelling individuals with spinal cord injury, highlighting the crucial role of environmental and personal factors. You can leverage the ICF framework for a more comprehensive assessment and intervention approach for SCI patients in your community.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系，也无法追踪功能限制和因素随时间的变化。
items.limitationEn: The study's cross-sectional design prevents the establishment of causality and cannot track changes in functional limitations and factors over time.

items.title: Implementation and evaluation of a stroke sexual health practice profile for rehabilitation in Ontario, Canada.
items.summary: A Quality Improvement Initiative in Ontario, Canada, successfully implemented and evaluated a structured, team-based approach to integrate sexual health into stroke rehabilitation, using the PLISSIT model and a Stroke Sexual Health Practice Profile.
items.curatedReason: 该研究成功地在加拿大安大略省的卒中康复中整合了性健康实践。在你的实践中，若面临类似患者群体，可以借鉴这种基于团队的结构化方法。
items.titleZh: 在加拿大安大略省实施和评估卒中康复性健康实践规范
items.summaryZh: 加拿大安大略省的一项质量改进倡议成功实施并评估了一种结构化、基于团队的方法，利用 PLISSIT 模型和卒中性健康实践规范，将性健康融入卒中康复。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study successfully integrated sexual health practices into stroke rehabilitation in Ontario, Canada. If you encounter similar patient populations in your practice, you can draw on this team-based, structured approach.
items.limitation: 研究设计为质量改进倡议，缺乏对照组和随机化，可能无法完全归因于干预措施的有效性。
items.limitationEn: The study design was a quality improvement initiative, lacking a control group and randomization, so the effectiveness cannot be fully attributed to the intervention.

items.title: Elevance Health to exit small-group ACA market in 1 state
items.summary: Elevance Health is set to exit the small-group Affordable Care Act (ACA) market in one US state, potentially impacting insurance options for small businesses.
items.curatedReason: Elevance Health 退出俄亥俄州小团体 ACA 市场，这会影响当地小团体医疗保险的可及性和成本。你可能需要关注其对患者转介和报销政策的潜在影响。
items.titleZh: Elevance Health 将退出一州的小团体 ACA 市场
items.summaryZh: Elevance Health 计划退出美国一州的小团体平价医疗法案（ACA）市场，可能影响小企业的保险选择。
items.curatedReasonEn: Elevance Health's exit from the Ohio small-group ACA market will impact the availability and cost of small-group health insurance there. You may need to monitor its potential effects on patient referrals and reimbursement policies.

items.title: Smallest worthwhile effect of anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction compared with non-surgical management: a benefit-harm trade-off study.
items.summary: This study estimated the smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction followed by rehabilitation versus rehabilitation only, for improving knee function and return to sport, and explored associations with participant characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 韧带重建（ACL）结合康复与单纯康复相比，其膝关节功能改善和重返运动所需的最小效应量已得到估算。这提供了实用的临床决策参考，帮助你与患者沟通手术与非手术治疗的预期效益。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建与非手术治疗相比的最小有效效应：一项效益-风险权衡研究
items.summaryZh: 这项研究估算了前交叉韧带（ACL）重建结合康复与单纯康复相比，改善膝关节功能和重返运动的最小有效效应，并探讨了与参与者特征的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: The smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction plus rehabilitation versus rehabilitation alone for improving knee function and return to sport has been estimated. This provides practical clinical decision-making reference, helping you communicate expected benefits of surgical versus non-surgical treatment with patients.
items.limitation: 研究的 benefit-harm trade-off 评估可能受限于患者偏好和感知风险的个体差异。
items.limitationEn: The benefit-harm trade-off assessment in the study may be limited by individual differences in patient preferences and perceived risks.

items.title: Crossroads in Spinal Cord Injury Treatment: A Multidisciplinary Conference at a Pivotal Moment.
items.summary: The 'Crossroads in Spinal Cord Injury Treatment' conference, held in January 2026, brought together multidisciplinary experts to discuss future directions in SCI care and research.
items.curatedReason: 这次脊髓损伤多学科会议回顾了 SCI 护理和研究的最新方向，为该领域未来发展提供了重要视角。这提示你关注多学科合作和新兴技术对 SCI 康复的潜在影响。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤治疗的十字路口：关键时刻的多学科会议
items.summaryZh: 2026年1月在休斯顿举行的一场多学科会议“脊髓损伤治疗的十字路口：现在与未来”汇聚了临床医生、研究人员、工程师和脊髓损伤患者，探讨了脊髓损伤护理和研究的未来方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multidisciplinary conference reviewed the latest directions in SCI care and research, offering important perspectives on future developments in the field. This prompts you to pay attention to the potential impact of multidisciplinary collaboration and emerging technologies on SCI rehabilitation.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Barriers, facilitators and promising interventions for reducing sedentary behaviour during and after stroke rehabilitation - A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified barriers, facilitators, and promising behavior change techniques for reducing sedentary behavior during and after stroke rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 卒中康复期间及之后减少久坐行为的干预措施仍需改进。这份范围综述识别了潜在的障碍、促进因素和行为改变技术，你在设计康复方案时可以参考这些策略来鼓励患者活动，但需注意目前尚无确切的“最佳”干预方案。
items.titleZh: 卒中康复期间及之后减少久坐行为的障碍、促进因素和有前景干预措施：范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别了卒中康复期间及之后减少久坐行为的障碍、促进因素和有前景的行为改变技术。
items.curatedReasonEn: Interventions to reduce sedentary behavior during and after stroke rehabilitation need improvement. This scoping review identifies potential barriers, facilitators, and behavior change techniques; you can refer to these strategies to encourage patient activity in your rehabilitation plans, but note there's no definitive 'best' intervention yet.
items.limitation: 范围综述侧重广度而非深度，无法提供具体干预措施的疗效量化数据。
items.limitationEn: The scoping review prioritizes breadth over depth, so it cannot provide quantified efficacy data for specific interventions.

items.title: Rehabilitation and Management in Lateral Medullary Stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome): A Scoping Review and Evidence Map.
items.summary: A scoping review and evidence map provides a comprehensive overview of rehabilitation interventions for lateral medullary stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome), distinguishing direct intervention evidence from management and assessment reports.
items.curatedReason: 这篇范围综述和证据图为外侧延髓卒中（Wallenberg综合征）的康复干预提供了全面的概览。它帮你识别现有证据和知识空白，从而更好地指导临床实践和未来研究方向。
items.titleZh: 外侧延髓卒中（Wallenberg综合征）的康复和管理：范围综述和证据图
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述和证据图全面概述了外侧延髓卒中（Wallenberg综合征）的康复干预措施，并区分了直接干预证据与管理和评估报告。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review and evidence map provide a comprehensive overview of rehabilitation interventions for lateral medullary stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome). It helps you identify existing evidence and knowledge gaps, guiding clinical practice and future research.
items.limitation: 范围综述的局限在于不进行证据质量评估，因此无法对特定干预措施的有效性给出强推荐。
items.limitationEn: A limitation of scoping reviews is that they do not assess evidence quality, thus precluding strong recommendations for specific interventions.

items.title: Perceptions of Chronic Low Back Pain and Physiotherapy in India: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: A qualitative study in India identified that chronic low back pain patients face barriers to physiotherapy due to cultural factors like pain stigmatization, over-reliance on analgesics, and low awareness of PT's role.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了印度文化背景下慢性腰痛患者对物理治疗的认知障碍，例如对疼痛的污名化、过度依赖止痛药和缺乏PT意识。了解这些能帮你更好地与患者沟通，降低依从性屏障。
items.titleZh: 印度慢性腰痛患者对物理治疗的认知：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在印度的定性研究发现，慢性腰痛患者在寻求物理治疗时面临文化障碍，如疼痛污名化、过度依赖止痛药及对PT作用认知不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study highlights barriers to physiotherapy perception among chronic LBP patients in India, such as pain stigmatization, over-reliance on analgesics, and lack of PT awareness. Understanding these factors can help you improve patient communication and adherence.
items.limitation: 定性研究结果的普遍性受限于特定文化背景。
items.limitationEn: The generalizability of qualitative study findings is limited by specific cultural contexts.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Treadmill training with rhythmic auditory cueing and/or visual feedback for persons with Multiple Sclerosis: feasibility and effects on gait parameters in a clinical randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=56) found that treadmill training with visual feedback and/or rhythmic auditory cueing was feasible and showed promising effects on gait parameters in persons with Multiple Sclerosis.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，结合视觉反馈和/或节律性听觉提示的跑台训练对多发性硬化症患者的步态参数是可行且有效的。这些辅助手段为多发性硬化症患者的步态训练提供了有前景的策略。
items.titleZh: 节律性听觉提示和/或视觉反馈跑台训练对多发性硬化症患者步态参数的可行性及效果：一项临床随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=56）发现，结合视觉反馈和/或节律性听觉提示的跑台训练对多发性硬化症患者的步态参数是可行且显示出积极效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that treadmill training with visual feedback and/or rhythmic auditory cueing is feasible and effective for gait parameters in Multiple Sclerosis patients. These adjuncts offer promising strategies for gait training in MS.
items.limitation: 该研究为临床可行性试验，样本量（N=56）较小，且主要关注短期步态参数，长期功能改善仍需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a clinical feasibility trial with a small sample size (N=56), primarily focusing on short-term gait parameters; long-term functional improvement requires further validation.

items.title: Barriers and Trends to Early Mobilization in Children With a Traumatic Brain Injury.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study identified common barriers to early mobility in pediatric ICU patients with traumatic brain injury, including sedation, mechanical ventilation, and medical instability.
items.curatedReason: 对于儿童创伤性脑损伤患者，早期活动面临多种障碍，包括镇静和通气。你在设计康复方案时，应识别并尽可能解决这些可控因素，以促进更早的活动。
items.titleZh: 创伤性脑损伤儿童早期活动中的障碍与趋势
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究描述了儿童创伤性脑损伤患者在儿科ICU中早期活动的情况，并识别了镇静、机械通气等主要障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early mobilization for children with traumatic brain injury faces multiple barriers, including sedation and ventilation. When designing rehabilitation protocols, you should identify and, where possible, address these modifiable factors to facilitate earlier activity.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性单中心研究，结果可能受到选择偏倚的影响，且外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective single-center study may be subject to selection bias and has limited generalizability.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Innovative technologies for gait rehabilitation in incomplete spinal cord injury: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis synthesized current evidence on technological interventions for gait rehabilitation in adults with incomplete spinal cord injury, highlighting their efficacy.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析强调了创新技术在不完全脊髓损伤（iSCI）步态康复中的潜力。在为 iSCI 患者设计康复方案时，你可以优先考虑整合这些有强证据支持的技术，以优化步态功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 不完全脊髓损伤步态康复中的创新技术：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析综合了不完全脊髓损伤成人步态康复中技术干预的现有证据，强调了其有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis highlights the potential of innovative technologies in gait rehabilitation for incomplete spinal cord injury (iSCI). When designing rehabilitation protocols for iSCI patients, prioritize integrating these strongly evidenced technologies to optimize gait function recovery.
items.limitation: 不同技术类型、患者特征和随访时间上的异质性较高，限制了某些具体干预措施的普适性推荐。
items.limitationEn: High heterogeneity in technology types, patient characteristics, and follow-up durations limits the generalizability of specific intervention recommendations.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation

items.title: Two-Year Outcomes of the Proximal Hamstring Avulsion Rehabilitation Regimes: Longitudinal Versus Accelerated Protocol (PHARRLAP) Study: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 2-year follow-up found that an accelerated rehabilitation protocol was non-inferior to a longitudinal protocol for proximal hamstring avulsion repair, with similar clinical outcomes, strength, and functional symmetry.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 的两年随访数据证实，加速康复方案在近端腘绳肌撕脱伤术后恢复中，与传统方案相比在临床结局、力量和功能对称性上具有非劣效性。这为你提供了更早介入主动康复的证据支持。
items.titleZh: 近端腘绳肌撕脱伤康复方案的两年结局：纵向与加速方案（PHARRLAP）研究：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项为期两年的随机对照试验显示，加速康复方案在近端腘绳肌撕脱伤修复后，与纵向方案在临床结局、力量和功能对称性方面无显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Two-year follow-up data from this RCT confirm that an accelerated rehabilitation protocol is non-inferior to traditional protocols in clinical outcomes, strength, and functional symmetry after proximal hamstring avulsion repair. This provides evidence to support earlier active rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究对象主要为运动员，其依从性和康复能力可能高于一般人群，结果外推需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were primarily athletes, whose adherence and rehabilitation capabilities might be higher than the general population, so results should be extrapolated with caution.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.curatedReason: 加拿大一项定性研究揭示了患者和多学科临床医生对高级实践物理治疗师（APP）主导的肌肉骨骼护理模式的看法。APP在减轻全球医疗系统负担方面表现出潜力，但加拿大在系统整合上仍有障碍。这为希望深入了解 APP 模式在不同国家实施挑战和机遇的同行提供了宝贵视角。
items.titleZh: 加拿大高级实践物理治疗师主导的肌肉骨骼护理模式视角：一项患者和多学科临床医生的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 加拿大一项定性研究显示，患者和多学科临床医生对高级实践物理治疗师（APP）主导的肌肉骨骼护理模式持积极态度，但其在加拿大仍面临系统性整合障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study from Canada explores the perceptions of patients and multidisciplinary clinicians regarding Advanced Practice Physiotherapy (APP)-led musculoskeletal care. While APP shows promise in reducing healthcare burden globally, Canada faces systemic integration barriers. This offers valuable insight for peers interested in the implementation challenges and opportunities of APP models in various countries.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，结果可能不具备广泛代表性，且受访者数量有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study, so its findings may not be broadly generalizable and the number of participants is limited.
